content.text:
Based on my search results, I can provide you with comprehensive information about reducing wrinkles without surgery in the Houston area. Here are the main non-surgical options available:

## Injectable Treatments

### Neuromodulators (Muscle Relaxers)

citations.cited_text: BOTOX is an FDA-approved injectable that temporarily reduces or eliminates the appearance of moderate to severe wrinkles and forehead lines, frown lin...
citations.title: Non-Surgical Face and Neck Procedures in Houston | Dr. Rednam

content.text: BOTOX is an FDA-approved injectable that temporarily reduces or eliminates the appearance of moderate to severe wrinkles and forehead lines, frown lines, and crow's feet.

Other options include:

- **Dysport**:

citations.cited_text: An injectable treatment that works similar to BOTOX is Dysport, which reduces and softens lines and wrinkles on the upper face.
citations.title: Dysport Injections - Nonsurgical Wrinkle Treatment - Houston, TX - Dr. Nikko

citations.cited_text: Dysport also acts faster, with noticeable results showing within 2 – 3 days after treatment.
citations.title: Dysport Injections - Nonsurgical Wrinkle Treatment - Houston, TX - Dr. Nikko

content.text: An injectable treatment that works similar to BOTOX and reduces and softens lines and wrinkles on the upper face, with noticeable results showing within 2 – 3 days after treatment.
- **Xeomin**:

citations.cited_text: Xeomin is FDA-approved to temporarily improve the appearance of moderate to severe frown lines and forehead lines in adults. Results appear a week aft...
citations.title: Wrinkle Relaxers | Houston's Top Med Spa | Persona Med Spa | Houston TX

content.text: FDA-approved to temporarily improve the appearance of moderate to severe frown lines and forehead lines in adults, with results appearing a week after treatment and typically lasting up to four months.
- **Jeuveau**:

citations.cited_text: Jeuveau can treat lines and wrinkles, which will help give you a more youthful appearance without surgery.
citations.title: Jeuveau Houston | Wrinkle Treatment Option

citations.cited_text: Results will be visible in 3-7 days.
citations.title: Jeuveau Houston | Wrinkle Treatment Option

content.text: Can treat lines and wrinkles, which will help give you a more youthful appearance without surgery, with results visible in 3-7 days.
### Dermal Fillers

citations.cited_text: Dermal fillers are injected into the skin in a minimally-invasive procedure that can temporarily augment facial features, add volume, or fill in lines...
citations.title: Non-Surgical Face and Neck Procedures in Houston | Dr. Rednam

content.text: Dermal fillers are injected into the skin in a minimally-invasive procedure that can temporarily augment facial features, add volume, or fill in lines, wrinkles, and facial folds for a smoother, younger-looking appearance. Dermal fillers are typically gel-based hyaluronic acid (HA) formulas that are safe, effective, and offer immediate results.

## Laser and Energy-Based Treatments

### Helix CO2 Laser

citations.cited_text: The three customizable levels of Helix CO2—CoolPeel, Sultra, and FUSION—include both ablative and non-ablative treatments. Helix CO2 can tighten skin ...
citations.title: Non-Surgical Face and Neck Procedures in Houston | Dr. Rednam

content.text: The three customizable levels of Helix CO2—CoolPeel, Sultra, and FUSION—include both ablative and non-ablative treatments. Helix CO2 can tighten skin and treat acne scars, fine lines and wrinkles, and more.
### Sofwave

citations.cited_text: Sofwave™ is an FDA cleared, non-invasive treatment of fine lines and wrinkles using a next generation SUPERB™ Synchronous Ultrasound Parallel Beam Tec...
citations.title: Sofwave Houston TX | Non-Invasive Skin Tightening | Non-Surgical Facelift

content.text: Sofwave™ is an FDA cleared, non-invasive treatment of fine lines and wrinkles using a next generation SUPERB™ Synchronous Ultrasound Parallel Beam Technology. The fractional heating effect created by Sofwave's unique ultrasound delivery, stimulates the production of new collagen and elastin which leads to the reduction in fine lines and wrinkles.
### Ellacor

citations.cited_text: The ellacor® procedure uses hollow needles to remove tiny cores of skin. This process, known as micro-coring, triggers the body’s natural healing resp...
citations.title: Ellacor for Wrinkle Treatment in Houston | Skin Tightening

citations.cited_text: The removal of these micro-cores causes the skin to contract and tighten, reducing the appearance of moderate to severe wrinkles without causing visib...
citations.title: Ellacor for Wrinkle Treatment in Houston | Skin Tightening

content.text: The ellacor® procedure uses hollow needles to remove tiny cores of skin. This process, known as micro-coring, triggers the body's natural healing response. The removal of these micro-cores causes the skin to contract and tighten, reducing the appearance of moderate to severe wrinkles without causing visible scarring.
### Radiofrequency Treatments

citations.cited_text: With nonsurgical skin tightening, our Houston, TX office offers several options including Exilis Ultra 360™, Vanquish™, Cellutone™, and INFINI RF.
citations.title: Nonsurgical Skin Tightening - Houston, TX - Dr. Nikko

citations.cited_text: Our nonsurgical skin tightening treatment provides a range of great results for patients struggling with wrinkles, acne scars, and sagging skin.
citations.title: Nonsurgical Skin Tightening - Houston, TX - Dr. Nikko

content.text: With nonsurgical skin tightening, Houston offices offer several options including Exilis Ultra 360™, Vanquish™, Cellutone™, and INFINI RF. Our nonsurgical skin tightening treatment provides a range of great results for patients struggling with wrinkles, acne scars, and sagging skin.
## Chemical Peels and Facials

citations.cited_text: Procedures such as Profound, Kybella, and chemical peels can reduce the appearance of wrinkles, erase sun damage, and tighten skin.

content.text: Procedures such as Profound, Kybella, and chemical peels can reduce the appearance of wrinkles, erase sun damage, and tighten skin.

content.text: Limited-edition Elemis Pro-Glow Rose facial uses advanced, clinically proven formulas and expert lifting massage techniques to improve skin firmness and visibly reduce fine lines and wrinkles.

## Notable Houston Providers

Several reputable medical spas and clinics in Houston offer these treatments:

- **Dr. Rukmini Rednam** (The Woodlands/Houston)
- **Texas Facial Plastic Surgery** with Dr. Kent Davis
- **PS Med Spa** founded by Dr. Sam Sukkar
- **It's a Secret Med Spa** (Crestwood/Glen Cove area)
- **VIO Med Spa** (West University)
- **The Memorial Spa** (Memorial City)
- **Aesthetic Specialists of Houston** (Bellaire)

## What to Expect
